name: Solv Health Urgent Care and Same-Day Scheduling API
what_it_does: Solv Health urgent care and same-day appointment REST API for urgent care centers, retail health clinics, and primary care practices to manage online booking, patient flow, and digital patient experience. Enables AI agents to manage same-day appointment and walk-in slot availability for urgent care booking automation, handle patient registration and digital intake for check-in workflow automation, access wait time estimation and queue management for patient flow automation, retrieve insurance acceptance and eligibility display for patient access automation, manage patient review collection and reputation management for clinic quality automation, handle digital check-in and pre-arrival intake for patient experience automation, access multi-location clinic network management for urgent care chain automation, retrieve visit volume and utilization analytics for clinic operations reporting, manage telehealth and in-person hybrid booking for urgent care digital access automation, and integrate Solv with urgent care EMR systems (Experity, Meditech) for end-to-end urgent care digital patient management.
use_cases: Managing urgent care wait times from patient flow automation agents
Booking same-day appointments from digital health access agents
Processing digital intake from urgent care check-in agents
Reporting clinic utilization from urgent care analytics agents
not_for: Emergency department scheduling (not appropriate for ED bypass)
Specialist referral scheduling (use Zocdoc or Kyruus)
Hospital inpatient scheduling and bed management
best_when: An urgent care center, retail health clinic, or primary care practice wanting AI agents to automate same-day appointment booking, digital patient intake, wait time management, and clinic utilization reporting within Solv's consumer-facing urgent care scheduling platform.
avoid_when: URGENT CARE SCOPE OF SERVICE ACCURACY: Automated wait time and availability display via Solv must reflect accurate urgent care service scope; automated availability that presents services outside the clinic's capability creates patient access failure when patients arrive for services not available at location. HIPAA FOR PATIENT INTAKE DATA VIA SOLV: Automated patient registration and intake data collected via Solv (insurance, chief complaint, demographics) constitutes PHI; Solv operates as HIPAA Business Associate; automated integration requires Solv BAA and HIPAA-compliant data handling. EMERGENCY SYMPTOM SCREENING IN DIGITAL INTAKE: Automated digital intake via Solv for urgent care must include emergency symptom screening; automated intake without emergency diversion flag creates clinical risk when patients with emergency symptoms route to urgent care rather than ED; implement automated emergency symptom triage in digital intake workflow.

auth.notes: Solv Health uses API key and OAuth for clinic and partner integrations. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, California HQ. Founded 2017 by Heather Fernandez. Private (~$45M raised, GV, Oak HC/FT). Urgent care and same-day healthcare scheduling marketplace. 9,000+ urgent care and primary care locations. Digital check-in, wait time display, and patient review management. Experity, Meditech, and EClinicalWorks EMR integration. HIPAA Business Associate. Competes with Zocdoc and NexHealth for urgent care and same-day scheduling.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free basic listing for urgent care centers; premium features require subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-location premium subscription for enhanced features (booking, analytics, reviews); enterprise pricing for chains
pricing.notes: San Francisco CA. Private. Founded 2017. Per-location subscription. Free basic listing. Premium for booking and analytics. Enterprise for chains.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; availability and booking queries throttled; webhooks for booking and intake events

known_agent_gotchas: WAIT TIME ACCURACY FOR AUTOMATED PATIENT MESSAGING: Solv wait time estimates are based on current queue depth and historical throughput; automated patient messaging with specific wait time commitments creates dissatisfaction when actual wait exceeds estimate during unexpected volume surges; communicate wait times as estimates with uncertainty range rather than precise commitments

DIGITAL INTAKE EMERGENCY SYMPTOM DIVERSION: Automated Solv digital intake workflow must include emergency symptom screening question (chest pain, difficulty breathing, stroke symptoms); automated intake without emergency diversion creates urgent care liability for patients who should have been directed to ED; implement automated emergency symptom check-list with ED diversion instruction

EMR INTEGRATION CHIEF COMPLAINT MAPPING: Automated Solv intake data routing to urgent care EMR requires chief complaint mapping to EMR template; Solv chief complaint field maps to different EMR fields depending on EMR system (Experity, Meditech); automated intake without EMR-specific field mapping creates manual chart reconciliation at check-in

REVIEW SOLICITATION TIMING HIPAA COMPLIANCE: Automated patient review collection via Solv post-visit must not reference specific treatment, diagnosis, or clinical details in review request message; HIPAA minimum necessary standard prohibits PHI in marketing-adjacent patient communications; automated review request must be generic and not reference visit clinical details

CLINIC HOURS AND HOLIDAY SCHEDULE MAINTENANCE: Automated Solv availability display must reflect real-time clinic hours including holiday closures and unexpected early closings; automated availability without real-time hours update creates patient booking for closed clinic; implement hours change notification in automated Solv clinic management workflow

CAPACITY MANAGEMENT FOR HOLIDAY SURGE EVENTS: Urgent care experiences predictable volume surges (Thanksgiving, New Year, first week of school); automated booking without capacity management during surge periods creates double-booking and extreme wait time; implement dynamic capacity throttling for automated booking during known surge periods
agent_readiness.security_notes: Urgent care scheduling. HIPAA. API key/OAuth. US. Patient PHI, appointment data, and clinic operations information.

security_score_components.security_notes: Urgent care scheduling. HIPAA. API key/OAuth. US. Patient PHI, scheduling, and clinic data.
